decision: Adobe Sign card is a compact operational companion module, not a mini Adobe app.
My Projects remains dominant; Adobe Sign remains secondary; do not stretch Adobe to sibling height.
Eyebrow remains 'Adobe Sign'; title becomes 'Agreement Activity'.
View switch labels remain Action Queue and Completed.
View switch sits below stable heading and uses manual-activation tab semantics.
Visible status chip and freshness rail are required.
Preserve existing home-surface span overrides unless Prompt 06 proves impossible and stops.
Remove MyWorkCard.titleContent and Adobe-specific shared CSS.
Rows are not whole-row click targets; use explicit Open link only when sourceOpenUrl exists.
No synthesized Adobe URLs and no generic footer destination without truthful repo-supported URL.
Preview-limit context is required when total > displayed.
Do not render 'Updated date unavailable'; use graceful metadata fallback.
Completed-panel lazy-fetch errors receive local Retry; Action Queue home-read errors do not.
No backend/functions contract changes in this package.
Do not add dependencies or lockfile/package drift.
Target post-remediation score is 48+/56; preferred target 50/56.
